name: 12L INT4 bQAT + EMA Fix + Value Embeddings
blurb: 12-layer INT4 MLP+bigram QAT + U-Net skips + XSA(last 4) + EMA(0.997) with QAT-reset fix + LeakyReLU² + RoPE16 + LN Scale + resid_mix + Legal TTT + Value Embeddings (ve_dim=128, last 2 layers). Value embeddings reinject token identity into V at layers 10-11, improving quality per step. Step_avg ~137ms, ~4380 steps in 10 min. Post-quant degradation very clean (1.1643 from 1.1754 pre-quant). 8×H100 seed 1: ttt_bpb=1.15875.
author: Harsh Soni
